news.summary: Many nations that prohibit cryptocurrency payments domestically do not place restrictions on their use abroad. However, this legal inconsistency could draw attention from international regulatory bodies such as the Financial Action Task Force (FATF). This issue is significant as the FATF plays a crucial role in combating money laundering and terrorist financing globally, with 39 member countries and regions. By permitting the use of cryptocurrencies internationally while banning them domestically, countries may inadvertently invite scrutiny and potential regulatory action from bodies like the FATF.
news.headline: Use of crypto payments may be permitted internationally despite bans in some countries. Legal overlaps may draw attention from global regulators, such as FATF.

news.summary: Kamena Kostova, a Ph.D. holder, stands out among a distinguished cohort of researchers acknowledged on a national scale for their potential in influencing upcoming scientific breakthroughs. This acknowledgment was made public on June 27, 2025, in Kansas City, Missouri. Dr. Kostova serves as an Assistant Investigator at the Stowers Institute for Medical Research.
news.headline: Kamena Kostova, Ph.D., of Stowers Institute named 2025 Freeman Hrabowski Scholar by HHMI, recognized for scientific promise.

news.summary: Graceland in Memphis, Tennessee reveals that Virtual Elvis Week will be held this year. Virtual Elvis Week 2025 - Live from Graceland is scheduled for August 8-16. This virtual event will commemorate the legacy of Elvis Presley, featuring live concert events, discussions with special guests, contests, and fan experiences. The program will include 10 live events from the Graceland Soundstage.
news.headline: Virtual Elvis Week 2025 at Graceland will take place from August 8-16 with 10 live events, offering fans a unique online experience.

news.summary: Ubitus and NMNS have collaborated to introduce an AI-powered virtual guide designed to offer an immersive experience into the realm of whales. This innovative platform will enable users to explore and learn about whales through cutting-edge technology. The collaboration aims to provide a unique learning experience accessible to a broad audience.
news.headline: Ubitus & NMNS launch AI-powered virtual guide for exploring whales to audience worldwide.

news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, companies looking to update revenue management for evolving business models have a variety of options to select from, according to ISG. The company states that there is a rising number of applications and integrated platforms available for this purpose.
news.headline: ISG recommends software for revenue management in new business models; companies have variety of options.

news.summary: In McKinney, Texas, ScienceSoft proudly reveals Gala Batsishcha, their Senior Business Analyst and Healthcare IT Consultant, has been honored as one of the Top 100 Women in Health IT to Know in 2025 by Becker’s Hospital Review. Gala's selection highlights her unique combination of clinical, pharmaceutical, and IT acumen, along with her impactful role in driving digital innovation in the healthcare sector. This prestigious annual list from Becker’s Hospital Review spotlights female trailblazers influencing the industry.
news.headline: Senior Business Analyst and Healthcare IT Consultant Gala Batsishcha from ScienceSoft makes 'Top 100 Women in Health IT for 2025' by Becker's Hospital Review.

news.summary: Progress Software (NASDAQ: PRGS) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on June 30, 2025. Analysts estimate an EPS of $1.30. Investors are eager for results exceeding expectations and positive guidance for the next quarter, as market reactions often hinge on guidance. In the previous quarter, the company surpassed EPS estimates by $0.25, leading to a 12.13% rise in share price the next day. Past performances indicate the impact of EPS beats on stock prices; in Q1 2025, EPS beat was 12.0%, and in Q4 2024 it was -10.0%. Progress Software's shares were trading at $63.75 on June 26, with a 19.25% increase over the last 52 weeks, indicating positive returns. Investors should heed analysts' perspectives for insights on market sentiments and industry expectations. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Progress Software (PRGS) to announce earnings on 2025-06-30 with estimated EPS of $1.30. Past quarter EPS beat by $0.25, leading to 12.13% share price increase. news.summary: A recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ indicates that the industrial hose market is expected to increase in value, reaching USD 11.99 billion by 2025 and USD 13.92 billion by 2030. This would represent a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.0%. The surge in demand for industrial hoses is identified as a key factor propelling this growth.

news.summary: Lending in the Bitcoin market is experiencing a resurgence with stricter regulations in place. However, the continued volatility of the market poses a risk of unforeseen liquidations. This resurgence in Bitcoin lending comes amidst concerns over its stability, with the cryptocurrency market being particularly vulnerable to sudden fluctuations. This renewed interest in Bitcoin lending reflects a growing trend in the market, where investors are looking for alternative ways to generate returns. The number of Bitcoin loans has increased significantly in recent months, reaching a total of X loans currently active in the market. Despite the risks involved, the potential for high returns continues to attract investors to this form of lending.
news.headline: Bitcoin loans are resurging with stricter guidelines, yet unpredictable fluctuations could lead to rapid liquidations.

news.summary: Halogen Ventures, a venture capital firm led by Jesse Draper, has launched its third fund aimed at addressing the needs of modern families. The firm is targeting a significant market opportunity valued at $7.5 trillion. Specializing in supporting early stage startups with at least one female founder, Halogen Ventures is making strides in the industry. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on June 27, 2025.
news.headline: Halogen Ventures closes $30M fund to invest in childcare & family future, targeting $7.5 trillion market. Focused on female-led startups.

news.summary: The executive chairman of Strategy, Michael Saylor, highlighted at the BTC Prague event on June 25 that Bitcoin treasury companies can leverage significant credit markets to drive Bitcoin adoption beyond conventional equity strategies. Saylor, along with Blockstream CEO Adam Back, shared a forward-looking perspective for the future of Bitcoin finance by introducing BTC-backed credit instruments. According to Saylor, while equity-based approaches have supported BTC accumulation, the true innovation lies in developing accessible credit financial products based on BTC. He emphasized the potential in issuing fixed-income instruments with Bitcoin featuring an average yearly return of approximately 55%, offering interest rates between 6-10%. The focus is on establishing a sustainable business model in issuing BTC backed credit instruments to facilitate the growth of Bitcoin adoption.
news.headline: Michael Saylor explains how Bitcoin treasury companies can accelerate growth through credit markets, aiming to issue BTC-backed credit instruments for annual returns of 6-10%.

news.summary: A recent report by USInsuranceAgents.com in Tampa, Florida, discussed home insurance coverage for wildfires. The report highlighted that in 2015, damages from wildfires amounted to $1.2 billion, a figure that surged to $5.5 billion by 2024. This substantial increase reflects a concerning trend in the escalating costs associated with wildfires.
news.headline: US home insurance faced $5.5B in wildfire damage, up from $1.2B in 2015, per report by USInsuranceAgents.com.

news.summary: The Treasury secretary has indicated that discussions with certain countries could extend until Labor Day, suggesting that the White House might refrain from imposing tariffs on select trading partners at the beginning of July.
news.headline: US Administration hints trade talks could extend past July, with some negotiations possibly lasting until Labor Day. Tariff imposition on partners could be postponed.
People's Bank of China approved Legend Holdings to reduce its stake in Lakala Payment, indicating a strategic move by the company.

news.summary: Apogee Enterprises Inc.'s (NASDAQ: APOG) stock rose as they reported strong first-quarter fiscal 2025 results, with revenue climbing 4.6% YoY to $346.62 million, surpassing the expected $325.48 million. The increase was driven by $22 million sales from the UW Solutions acquisition, offset by lower volume and mix. Adjusted EPS stood at 56 cents, beating the estimate of 47 cents. However, gross margin dropped to 21.7% from 29.8% due to restructuring charges, higher aluminum costs, product mix issues, and tariff expenses. SG&A expenses rose to 19.7% of sales, up 240 basis points due to restructuring charges and higher amortization from UW Solutions deal. Operating income decreased to $6.9 million, impacted by restructuring costs and other factors.
news.headline: Apogee CEO optimistic on tariffs, raises forecast. Q1 FY 2025 revenue up 4.6% to $346.62M, beating $325.48M estimate. EPS at 56 cents, above 47-cent estimate. Gross margin at 21.7%, down from 29.8%. SG&A expenses at 19.7% of sales, up 240 basis points. Operating income at $6.9M.

news.summary: Mercanto Holdings Inc. released their financial results for Q3 2025, with revenue at $887,862 (down from $1,135,991 in Q3 2024), a net loss of $88,367 (compared to a profit of $30,840 in Q3 2024), and EBITDA at - $41,018 (-$20,454 excluding write-offs). Current assets were at $1,169,109, while current liabilities stood at $797,843, with a working capital of $371,266. The company experienced a decline in revenue due to a rationalization process in Quebec and industry challenges, expecting these effects to continue into Q4 but positioning them well for the future. They have zero long-term debt and are optimistic about the medium- to long-term opportunities in the cannabis market.
news.headline: Mercanto Holdings Inc. (TSXV: MUSH) reports Q3 2025 financials: Revenue: $887,862, Net Loss: $88,367, EBITDA: -$41,018. Working Capital: $371,266. Positioning for long-term growth in Quebec's evolving cannabis market.

news.summary: Spain is investigating Novo Nordisk for covert advertising of weight-loss drugs. UK is researching genetic factors influencing risk of pancreatitis associated with GLP-1 injections for weight loss and diabetes. Yellow Card Biobank, a collaboration between UK MHRA and Genomics England, will study if genetic factors affect the risk of acute pancreatitis from GLP-1 injections. Acute pancreatitis with GLP-1 medicines is infrequent but reported. Patients with pancreatic issues are asked to report to Yellow Card scheme. Medicines like Novo Nordisk's Ozempic and Lilly's Mounjaro are linked to these issues. Study participation from healthcare professionals is encouraged. US adults are struggling with long-term use of obesity drugs.
news.headline: Spain accuses Novo Nordisk of covertly advertising weight-loss drugs; UK investigates genetic factors affecting risk of pancreatitis from GLP-1 injections. Also, patients with acute pancreatitis linked to GLP-1 drugs are urged to report to UK’s Yellow Card scheme. (Word count: 30)

news.summary: In San Francisco, companies Miraomics, Pythia Biosciences and LatchBio have unveiled a massive 30 million-cell atlas that covers more than 150 indications, 200 tissue types, and incorporates 27 measurement technologies sourced from public repositories. Despite the abundance of millions of single cell transcriptomes available online, this valuable data has largely been untapped due to the high costs associated with organizing and annotating the information for practical applications. Currently, these combined public datasets represent the most extensive collection of single-cell RNA sequencing data, presenting a significant resource for future research and analysis.
news.headline: Miraomics, Pythia Biosciences, and LatchBio unveil a 30M cell atlas covering 150+ indications, 200 tissue types; using AI to curate data efficiently.

news.summary: The likelihood of Bitcoin (BTC) reaching new record highs soon is limited, as indicated by a recent analysis from blockchain intelligence company Glassnode. The analysis points out diminishing momentum, decreased on-chain activity, and diminishing profitability for investors as key factors curbing immediate growth. Bitcoin briefly dropped to $99,000 over the weekend due to heightened geopolitical tensions but quickly bounced back to $106,000 after reports of de-escalation. Despite fluctuations, Bitcoin has been trading within a range of $100,000 to $110,000 since early May. Glassnode's findings suggest that Bitcoin has robust structural support in the $93,000 to $100,000 range, a level where significant accumulation took place in the first quarter.
news.headline: Bitcoin facing challenges in breaking all-time highs per Glassnode report. Rising tensions caused dip to $99k, now at $106k. Support at $93-100k. Range-bound at $100-110k since early May.

news.summary: The global biostimulants market is on track to reach USD 7.84 billion by 2030, from USD 4.46 billion in 2025, with a notable CAGR of 11.9%. The growth is attributed to a rising demand for sustainable agricultural practices. The US holds a significant position in the market due to its advanced agriculture sector, requiring innovative approaches like biostimulants for crop yield optimization. Factors fueling this growth include awareness of biostimulant benefits, advancements in formulations and technologies, reduced chemical fertilizer usage, and a focus on sustainable agriculture. Leading biostimulant segments include humic substances, seaweed extracts, amino acids, and mineral-based products. The market is adaptable across crop types through foliar, soil, and seed treatments. With the US having a favorable climate for innovation and increasing support for sustainable practices, the biostimulants market is poised for substantial expansion, playing a key role in shaping the future of agriculture in the country.
news.headline: US Biostimulants market to reach USD 7.84bn by 2030 (from USD 4.46bn in 2025) with 11.9% CAGR. Factors include demand for sustainable agriculture and rising awareness about biostimulants. US, with strong agri-tech and organic farming initiatives, is a dominant force. Key growth drivers: awareness of biostimulant benefits, tech advancements, reduced chemical fertilizer use, focus on sustainable agriculture. Leading segments include humic substances, seaweed extracts, amino acids, and mineral-based products, used in foliar, soil, and seed treatments across crop types. US market poised for growth with government support and consumer demand for sustainable agriculture. Biostimulants to revolutionize eco-friendly and sustainable crop production.

news.summary: In Cambridge, Mass., the AI platform Manta has secured a significant $2 million investment from Equal Opportunity Ventures. This marks a pivotal moment for Manta, highlighting a growing shift towards agentic AI. This type of AI not only analyzes data but also autonomously cleans it, explores it, tests hypotheses, and reveals insights. Essentially, Manta revolutionizes complex data analysis.
news.headline: Equal Opportunity Ventures invests $2M in Manta AI, transforming data science with agentic AI tools.

news.summary: Platinum prices have reached their highest point since 2014 due to supply constraints, increased investor interest, and a shift towards platinum as a more affordable alternative to gold. The metal hit $1,435 per ounce during Asian trading on Friday, marking a more than 50% increase from April lows. The surge is primarily fueled by a growing supply deficit. The World Platinum Investment Council (WPIC) forecasts a deficit of 966 koz in 2022, followed by 992 koz and 896 koz in 2023 and 2024, respectively. Mine production remains low, and recycling rates have not yet returned to pre-pandemic levels. The market is closely monitoring these developments as platinum continues its upward trend. More details are available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Platinum hits $1,400, driven by supply deficit, attracting investors as gold alternative. Supply deficit projected for 2022-2024.

news.summary: In Miami, Ontrak, Inc. disclosed the pricing details of a public offering. The offering consists of 6,666,667 shares of common stock (or pre-funded warrants) and 26,666,668 warrants to purchase up to 26,666,668 shares of common stock. The combined public offering price is set at $0.60 per share of common stock and accompanying warrants, amounting to a significant financial transaction. Ontrak, Inc. is identified as a prominent value-based behavioral healthcare company recognized for its use of proprietary AI and engagement technology.
news.headline: Ontrak Health prices $4 million public offering - includes 6,666,667 shares at $0.60/share.

news.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc, based in Fremont, California, revealed the outcome of its recent Exchange Offers targeted at specific Eligible Holders. The offers were designed for the exchange of all outstanding notes from eight series issued by Seagate HDD Cayman (referred to as the "Old Notes"). These Old Notes were swapped for new notes to be issued by Seagate Data Storage Technology Pte. Ltd. The final results of these Exchange Offers were announced today, as part of Seagate's strategic financial initiatives.
news.headline: Seagate announced final results of exchange offers for senior notes, involving 8 series issued by Seagate HDD.

news.summary: Cyberlux Corporation, a prominent defense technology company (OTC: CYBL), has recently signed a Memorandum of Understanding with George Mason University, a well-known public research institution. The collaboration aims to drive progress in crucial technology sectors such as 5G systems, unmanned aerial systems (UAS), cybersecurity, and advanced tactical communications. This strategic partnership signifies a significant step towards innovation in these areas, capitalizing on the expertise of both entities. Items on the agenda include potential advancements in the mentioned domains, facilitated by the synergy between Cyberlux Corporation and George Mason University.
news.headline: Cyberlux Corp partners with George Mason Univ to enhance defense innovation in 5G, UAS, cybersecurity, & communications.

news.summary: Coro, a cybersecurity company, is broadening its reach to the Australia and New Zealand region through a partnership with Bluechip Infotech. This move will introduce Coro's customizable cybersecurity platform and internationally recognized channel-based approach to partners in the area.
news.headline: Chicago-based Coro expands into Australia and New Zealand through Bluechip Infotech, offering modular cybersecurity platform to local partners.

news.summary: A report on the Asia-Pacific Data Center GPUs Market has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This market is expected to grow significantly, with projections indicating a rise to $44.6 billion by 2034 from $6.7 billion in 2024. The market is forecasted to have a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 20.80% during the period of 2024-2034. The surge in demand for high-performance computing in the Asia-Pacific region, driven by applications like AI, deep learning, and big-data analytics, is a key factor contributing to this growth.
news.headline: Asia-Pacific data center GPUs market to reach $44.6 billion by 2034, growing at 20.80% CAGR due to demand for AI-powered computing.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, Justin R. Koch opted for Sanctuary Wealth's Partnered Independence by launching CopperSky Wealth. This move aims to offer clients improved service and support. Sanctuary Wealth furnishes top-tier financial advisors with the autonomy, versatility, authority, and options they need.
news.headline: $225M advisor Justin R. Koch switches from Edward Jones to Sanctuary Wealth to launch CopperSky Wealth for clients.

news.summary: Argyle, Texas will soon welcome the newest location of Blo Blow Dry Bar, the original blow dry bar franchise in North America. Scheduled to open on July 11, 2025, the new bar will offer a special Founders Rate for the Mane Squeeze Membership. Customers can take advantage of this exclusive offer, showcasing their commitment to providing top-notch hairstyling services. This establishment will add to Blo Blow Dry Bar's existing network of locations across North America, highlighting its continued growth and popularity in the beauty industry.
news.headline: Entrepreneur brings Blo Blow Dry Bar to Argyle on July 11. Offers founders rate for membership.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, Yerbaé Brands Corp. and Safety Shot, Inc. finalized their business combination deal. Yerbaé, a plant-based energy beverage company, saw Safety Shot, a wellness and dietary supplement company, acquire all common shares of Yerbaé under a court-approved plan of arrangement. Yerbaé's shares were acquired by Safety Shot through this transaction. Yerbaé is listed on TSX-V as YERB.U and on OTCQX as YERBF, while Safety Shot is listed on Nasdaq as SHOT. This successful acquisition marks a significant milestone for both companies.
news.headline: Safety Shot has acquired Yerbaé Brands Corp, a plant-based energy beverage company, in a successful business combination.

news.summary: In June 27, 2025, WHP Global, a prominent brand management company from New York and the owner of VERA WANG, disclosed a fresh licensing agreement with the Batra Group. The collaboration involves the launch of Fall/Winter 2026 collection in VERA WANG showrooms during London and Paris Fashion Week in January 2026.
news.headline: WHP Global partners with Batra Group to launch Vera Wang collection in UK & Europe. Fall/Winter 2026 to debut at Vera Wang showrooms in London & Paris Fashion Week in Jan 2026.
